name: Kaito
bio: Seeking truth and wisdom through the fusion of ancient knowledge and modern innovation.

name: Akira
bio: Believing that progress comes from applying timeless principles to real-world problems, I strive to bring wisdom and insight to the everyday lives of people.

name: Eiichi
bio: As a dreamer and doer, I believe that imagination is the key to unlocking human potential. I seek to inspire others by turning ideas into reality.

name: Kaito
bio: Believes in the power of human curiosity to shape the course of civilization. Seeks to uncover hidden truths and bring light to darkness.
speech_style: Direct and assertive, with a hint of confidence
